item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct, treated the prompt as a routine scheduling request, and produced a duty table with dates and responsibilities.
